description.home: Hôthello - Digital transformation solutions for hospitality establishments. Modern, reliable software tailored for hotels.
description.services: Hôthello Services - Digital communication, centralized management, and optimized room service solutions for hotels.

hero.label: Digital Transformation for Hospitality
hero.title: Simplify Your Hotel's
hero.description: Hôthello delivers modern, reliable, and efficient software solutions tailored to your establishment. Built by two hospitality enthusiasts committed to excellence, for professionals like you.

mission.label: Why Hôthello
mission.title: Built for Hospitality Excellence
mission.description: We understand the unique challenges of hotel management. Our solutions are designed with one goal: helping you deliver exceptional guest experiences while streamlining operations.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Fast, responsive solutions that streamline your daily operations and boost efficiency across all departments.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: Intuitive interfaces that require no technical expertise. Clear information for your guests, simple management for your staff.

experience.title: Guest Experience
experience.description: Put your guests first with digital tools that enhance comfort, satisfaction, and memorable stays.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Digital Solutions That Deliver
services.description: Comprehensive tools designed to modernize every aspect of your hotel operations, from guest communication to room service.

communication.title: Smooth Communication
communication.description: Replace outdated paper flyers with elegant digital platforms. Provide guests with clear, accessible information about your establishment and local area.
communication.descriptionLong: In today's digital age, guests expect instant access to information. Our digital communication solutions replace traditional paper-based materials with beautiful, easy-to-navigate digital interfaces accessible from any device.
communication.descriptionExtra: From hotel amenities to local attractions, your guests will have everything they need at their fingertips—available 24/7, always up-to-date, and in their preferred language.

management.title: Centralized Management
management.description: Take control with intuitive admin dashboards. Manage all your content, services, and guest interactions from a single, unified platform.
management.descriptionLong: Managing multiple systems and platforms is time-consuming and error-prone. Our centralized management solution brings everything together—content, services, staff, and analytics—into one unified platform.
management.descriptionExtra: With role-based access controls, your team can collaborate efficiently while maintaining security and consistency across all touchpoints.

roomService.title: Optimized Room Service
roomService.description: Transform room service with online ordering systems. Improve workflows, reduce wait times, and enhance guest comfort throughout their stay.
roomService.descriptionLong: Traditional room service relies on phone calls, paper tickets, and manual coordination. Our digital room service solution modernizes the entire process—from browsing menus to placing orders to delivery tracking.
roomService.descriptionExtra: Guests enjoy a frictionless ordering experience while your kitchen staff benefits from clear, organized order management. The result: faster service, fewer errors, and happier guests.

additional.label: More Capabilities
additional.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
additional.description: Beyond our core services, Hôthello offers additional features to help you deliver exceptional hospitality.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.description: Showcase local partners, restaurants, and attractions to enhance your guests' experience.

activities.title: Activities & Mobility
activities.description: Help guests discover local activities, transportation options, and points of interest.

statistics.title: Statistics & Insights
statistics.description: Track engagement, popular services, and guest behavior to make informed decisions.

reviews.title: Reviews Management
reviews.description: Collect and manage guest feedback to continuously improve your services.

process.label: How It Works
process.title: Simple Implementation Process
process.description: Getting started with Hôthello is straightforward. We guide you through every step.

consultation.title: 1. Consultation
consultation.description: We discuss your needs, challenges, and goals to understand your establishment.

configuration.title: 2. Configuration
configuration.description: We set up your platform with your branding, content, and specific requirements.

training.title: 3. Training
training.description: Your team learns to use the system with hands-on guidance and documentation.

launch.title: 4. Launch
launch.description: Go live with confidence, knowing we're here to support you every step of the way.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: Built by Two Friends, For Hospitality Professionals
story.lead: Hôthello was born from a shared passion for hospitality and technology.
story.p1: We saw firsthand how hotels struggled with outdated systems, paper-based processes, and fragmented tools. We knew there had to be a better way.
story.p2: Today, we're committed to delivering modern, reliable, and efficient software solutions tailored to each establishment. Every feature we build is designed with hotel managers and their guests in mind.
story.tailoredDesc: No one-size-fits-all. We adapt to your needs.

testimonials.label: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.quote1: Hôthello transformed how we communicate with our guests. The digital transition was seamless, and our team adapted quickly. We've seen a significant improvement in guest satisfaction scores.
testimonials.quote2: From the first contact, we knew Hôthello was different. They listened to our needs, understood our challenges, and delivered exactly what we needed. The personal touch makes all the difference.
testimonials.quote3: Since switching to Hôthello's digital room service, orders increased by 40% and our kitchen errors dropped to nearly zero. The ROI was evident within the first month.
testimonials.role3: Operations Director, Hôtel & Resort Les Terrasses
testimonials.quote4: We eliminated over 10,000 printed pages per year and our guests love having everything on their phones. The multilingual support alone saved us countless hours of translation work.

pricing.pageDescription: Flexible plans adapted to your establishment's needs. No fixed commitments, no hidden fees.
pricing.allPlansNote: All plans include ongoing support and regular updates. No long-term contracts required.

essential.name: Essential
essential.tagline: Perfect for starting your digital journey
essential.bestFor: Ideal for boutique hotels with 1-30 rooms

custom.name: Tailor-made
custom.tagline: Fully customized to your specific needs

comparison.label: Compare Plans
comparison.title: Feature Breakdown
comparison.description: See exactly what's included in each plan to find the right fit for your hotel.

faq.label: Questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.q1: Why don't you display fixed prices?
faq.a1: Every hotel is different. The number of rooms, services offered, and specific requirements all affect the implementation. We believe in transparent, honest pricing that reflects the actual value we deliver to your establishment.
faq.a2: No. We don't believe in locking our clients into long-term agreements. Our service quality speaks for itself, and we're confident you'll want to continue working with us.
faq.q3: Can I upgrade my plan later?
faq.a3: Absolutely. You can start with the Essential plan and upgrade to Premium or Tailor-made as your needs evolve. We'll help you transition smoothly.
faq.q4: What kind of support is included?
faq.a4: All plans include email support and regular platform updates. Premium and Tailor-made plans include priority support with faster response times. We're always here to help.
faq.a5: It depends on the complexity of your requirements. Essential plans can be ready in a few days, while Tailor-made solutions require more time for customization. We'll give you a clear timeline during our consultation.

blog.pageDescription: Insights, guides, and tips to help your hotel thrive in the digital age.

article1.title: 5 Ways Digital Room Service Boosts Revenue
article1.excerpt: Discover how hotels are increasing room service orders by up to 40% with digital menus and online ordering — and why guests prefer it.

article2.title: Going Paperless: A Hotel's Guide to Digital Guest Communication
article2.excerpt: How to replace printed flyers, directories, and brochures with digital alternatives that save money and delight guests.

article3.title: The Real Cost of Outdated Hotel Systems
article3.excerpt: Paper waste, staff inefficiency, and missed guest expectations — we break down the hidden costs of not going digital.
